title: Glutathione for Skin Glow After 40: What the Science Actually Says
seo_title: Glutathione for Skin Glow After 40: What Science Actually Says
meta_description: Glutathione levels drop after 40, leaving skin duller and less even. Learn what the science says about oral and liposomal glutathione for skin brightness and glow.
tags: glutathione, skin glow, antioxidants, women over 40, oxidative stress, anti-aging, skin health
author: Happy Aging Team
excerpt: Glutathione is the body's master antioxidant and it declines naturally after 40, which is one reason skin loses its glow during midlife. Clinical research shows oral and liposomal glutathione can improve skin brightness, tone, and elasticity over 8 to 12 weeks.
